title: Picture2Pixel
summary: A Python library that converts images and GIFs into FPGA-displayable pixel art and Verilog-friendly OLED display logic.

title: CG2111A ROS Tutorial
summary: Self-contained Robot Operating System tutorial materials for CG2111A Engineering Principles and Practice II, including Raspberry Pi setup, ROS topics, LiDAR SLAM, networking, system images, and Q&A.
